question: A company tracks its average website sign-ups per year. According to the chart, which of the following statements is true?

options.B: The latest year shows a sharp decline in sign-ups compared to previous years.
options.D: The latest year has the lowest sign-ups of the entire period shown.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 4 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (848 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 2,632 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
